name: co-dialectic
description: Co-Dialectic v4.20.0 - TRUST THESIS REPAIR. Ships (a) named-person-claim-grounding semantic gate (PROMPT.md + claude -p judge) blocking biographical/logistical/relational claims about named people unless sourced from network/people/<slug>.json OR explicitly stated by user this session — fixes GH #11 CRITICAL (5 hallucinations in one session), (b) Protocol 3 sharpening with referent-ambiguity detection patterns (pronouns, possessives, vague 'they', geographic ambiguity, voice attribution), (c) buildReminder honesty:undefined cosmetic bug fix + defensive coding for missing state fields. RELOAD REQUIRED — older cached plugin installs (v4.9–v4.16 still present in installed_plugins.json on some project scopes) are running stale hooks; v4.18 task-first persona routing + v4.19 concise-by-default fixes will only take effect after a fresh plugin install picks up v4.20.0.
_product_vs_solution_marker: product-vs-solution: example — Anand authorship attribution is legitimate
